caption: A person with blond hair, wearing a black shirt, is seen in a small picture-in-picture window against a backdrop featuring a decorated Christmas tree. The majority of the screen displays a video game menu for a player named "TAYSOM HILL," who is rated "95." Various statistics are listed under "KEY" and "GENERAL" categories, including height "6' 2"" and weight "221." A graphic of a football player in a white jersey and helmet is shown on the right side of the menu. In the top banner, figures like "173,034," "14,600," and "2,093,944" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the person in the window talks and gestures. The menu screen changes, shifting from the "GENERAL" attribute view to an "OFFENSE" section, revealing a new set of numerical ratings such as "95," "82," "64," and "70." A notification at the bottom right states, "YOU HAVE 20 NEW NOTIFICATIONS."
